person_name: Capuanus, Vir Sublimis and judicial appointee under Theoderic the Great (fl. ca. 522)
person_name_full: Capuanus, Vir Sublimis and judicial appointee under Theoderic the Great (fl. ca. 522)
notes: Judicial appointee under King Theoderic the Great around 522, praised for subtle and gentle legal skill.

docs.title: Letter 5021
docs.author: Cassiodorus
docs.subject_summary: Book 5, Letter XXI: CAPUANO V. S
docs.excerpt: But you are believed to possess an understanding of every virtue, since you have earned the right to practice in the service of letters. You know the modesty you should maintain, having already proved yourself in the management of others' affairs.
